_comment: The Price of Power. Fossil block (WTI/Brent/Henry Hub/US regular gasoline) is live FRED, indexed to the first month = 100, refreshed best-effort daily by fetch.py. The lcoe (levelised cost of electricity, $/MWh) and non_usd (estimated share of oil trade settled outside the US dollar) blocks are CURATED from IRENA / Lazard and from published BIS / JPMorgan / Reuters estimates respectively; fetch.py never touches them.

lcoe._note: Global benchmark levelised cost of electricity for new build, $/MWh. Renewables from IRENA Renewable Power Generation Costs (global weighted average); fossil bands from Lazard LCOE+. Indicative, not a market price.

non_usd._note: Estimated share of global crude oil trade INVOICED or SETTLED outside the US dollar. There is no official series; this is a curated reading of published estimates (BIS, JPMorgan, Reuters reporting on yuan- and rupee-settled cargoes). Treat as a trend, not a precise figure.
